Please use this template to create pull requests for Velin.

## Description

Briefly describe the changes you've made.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactoring
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other

## How Has This Been Tested?

Describe how you tested your changes. Provide instructions so we can reproduce. Please also list any relevant details for your test environment.

## Checklist:

- [ ] My code follows the style guidelines of this project
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works
- [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally with my changes
- [ ] Any dependent changes have been merged and published in downstream modules

## Additional context

Add any other context or screenshots about the feature request here.## Summary
Provide a short summary of the changes in this pull request.

Explain **what was changed and why**.

---

## Related Issue

Link the related issue if applicable.

Examples:

Closes #123  
Fixes #45  
Related to #78

---

## Type of Change

Please check the relevant option.

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] UI / UX improvement
- [ ] Refactoring
- [ ] Build / tooling change

---

## Changes Made

Describe the main changes introduced in this PR.

Example:

- Improved PDF rendering performance
- Updated toolbar layout
- Fixed crash when loading corrupted PDF

---

## How Has This Been Tested?

Explain how the changes were tested.

Example:

- Tested on Windows and Linux
- Opened multiple PDFs
- Verified zoom and scroll behavior

---

## Screenshots / Videos (if applicable)

If this PR affects the UI, please attach screenshots or screen recordings.

---

## Checklist

Before submitting the PR, confirm the following:

- [ ] Code builds successfully
- [ ] No new warnings or errors introduced
- [ ] Code follows project style
- [ ] Documentation updated (if required)
- [ ] Self-review completed

---

## Additional Notes

Add any additional context that reviewers should know.
